title: Skelebros
description: Skeletons turn into either Sans or Papyrus from undertale.
body:
![Available on Codeberg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c1ef3f32a1a6882959b72b9406c4cfd33c325a9.png)![Requires Entity Texture Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef920648a137cb8ce4c46d01662881193f4d7b39.png)

Simple resource pack for skeletons to randomly turn into either Sans or Papyrus from undertale.  
**Note:** Based on old skeleton texture. It doesn't need to be like that, I just started making the texture without knowing I was working with the old texture.
